Product features:

  • Durable Manufactured Wood Construction: Built from high-quality engineered wood, this modern coffee table offers long-lasting strength and a smooth finish, perfect for busy living spaces.
  • Spacious Tabletop Design: The 47.2-inch wide surface provides ample room for drinks, decor, and everyday essentials, making it an ideal center table for living room gatherings and daily use.
  • Functional Open Storage Shelf: Featuring a convenient 9.8-inch tall lower shelf, this coffee table with storage helps you organize books, baskets, remotes, and more, keeping your living area clutter-free.
  • Contemporary Rustic Style: The clean lines, natural wood-look finish, and unique turned legs bring a rustic farmhouse coffee table vibe that complements modern, transitional, or casual interiors.
  • Quick and Easy Assembly: Designed for hassle-free setup with all tools and instructions included, so you can enjoy your new manufactured wood coffee table in minutes.

Graphic description

Rustic Solid Wood Coffee Table with Open Shelf – 47" Modern Farmhouse Design

Elevate your living room with this solid wood coffee table, blending rustic charm and modern farmhouse style. Crafted from durable natural wood, this 47.2-inch rectangular coffee table features a clean silhouette enhanced by elegant turned legs on one side, adding a unique design element that sets it apart. With dimensions of 47.2" L x 23.5" W x 15.15" H, the spacious surface is perfect for displaying décor, serving snacks, or holding everyday essentials. The open lower shelf (9.8” height) offers additional storage for books, baskets, or electronics, making this a practical and stylish centerpiece for any home.
